name: moxfield-collection-downloader
description: Electron app that saves responses from api2.moxfield.com to disk

scripts.headless:docker:build: docker build -t mcd -f build/package/Dockerfile --build-arg VERSION="$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo dev)" --build-arg REVISION="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" --build-arg BUILD_RFC3339="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" .

author: you
